title: Bands
lyrics:
[Hook: Lex]
?

[Verse: Keagan Hoffman]
She wants my bands, crushed my heart into little pieces
My mind is so crumbled, I can't see all of the pieces
And my heart been trembled
I've been humbled
Yeah she wanna take my soul
Take me on the road
Making 10 bands in a day, that's like everyday
Making like it's everyday
Stuntin' like my daddy and my drip is so fabulous
I don't care what they say
Bitch wanna trip on me but you don't know the real me
Are you fucking kidding me?
The medicine is killing me slowly
I'm so paralyzed I can't feel me

[Hook: Lex]
?
